title: High Haven
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''High Haven''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] supporting the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]] stationed outside the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] before and after the [[Battle of N'zoth]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was transferred there before the start of the battle for healing after his rescue from the [[Yevetha]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
